TestCase z28Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_a = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    if (t1.n > 0 && t1.a != NULL) {
        memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    }
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 2
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        // Less than 2 elements, cannot swap two elements, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    // Swap two elements in a subarray - here swap first and last elements of the full array as a subarray example
    int temp = follow_case.a[0];
    follow_case.a[0] = follow_case.a[follow_case.n - 1];
    follow_case.a[follow_case.n - 1] = temp;

    return follow_case;
}
